text.title: Competitor Analysis Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Competitor Analysis methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: identify-competitor-types
step.action: Enumerate direct/indirect/future; require concrete signal for futures.
step.decision-gate: If <5 direct, STOP and broaden category.

step.name: plot-positioning-matrix
step.action: Plot each competitor on price vs feature-breadth; mark empty quadrants.

step.name: fan-out-snapshots
step.action: Spawn N parallel Task calls (haiku) to fill snapshot template per competitor.
step.decision-gate: If any snapshot returns 'unsourced', re-run with explicit URL requirement.

step.name: extract-weaknesses
step.action: Sonnet reads 1-star reviews + Reddit; picks top 3 complaints per competitor.

step.name: gap-and-positioning
step.action: Opus selects gap type; writes positioning statement naming a competitor.
step.decision-gate: If positioning is feature-parity, reject and re-run on weakness corpus.
